
● 4단계: ThreadingConfiguration 인터페이스 생성

❯ 진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업, 남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은 것부터 진행해보자.

● 7단계: 통합 CompilerConfiguration 인터페이스 생성

     // for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a
     // BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.
     package com.android.tools.r8.config;

     /**
      * Unified configuration interface combining all compiler configuration aspects.
      * This follows Interface Segregation Principle (ISP) and Composite Pattern
      * to provide a unified view while allowing individual configuration access.
      *
     … +82 lines (ctrl+o to expand)

❯ 1

❯ s/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자.

  1 tasks (0 done, 1 in progress, 0 open)
  ◼ InternalOptions 분리 설계

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Create file
 src/main/java/com/android/tools/r8/config/package-info.java
╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 // Copyright (c) 2025, the R8 project authors. Please see the AUTHORS file
 // for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a
 // BSD-style license that can be found in the LICENSE file.

 /**
  * Configuration interfaces for R8/D8 compiler.
  *
  * <h2>Architecture Overview</h2>
  *
  * <p>This package provides a set of interfaces that follow SOLID principles to improve
  * the architecture of R8/D8 configuration management:
  *
  * <h3>SOLID Principles Applied</h3>
  *
  * <dl>
  *   <dt><b>Single Responsibility Principle (SRP)</b></dt>
  *   <dd>Each interface has one reason to change:
  *     <ul>
  *       <li>{@link CompilationConfiguration} - compilation mode and output settings</li>
  *       <li>{@link OptimizationConfiguration} - optimization behavior settings</li>
  *       <li>{@link DesugaringConfiguration} - desugaring behavior settings</li>
  *       <li>{@link ThreadingConfiguration} - threading and parallelism settings</li>
  *       <li>{@link ApiLevelConfiguration} - Android API level settings</li>
  *       <li>{@link ConsumerConfiguration} - output consumer settings</li>
  *     </ul>
  *   </dd>
  *
  *   <dt><b>Open/Closed Principle (OCP)</b></dt>
  *   <dd>New configuration aspects can be added by creating new interfaces
  *       without modifying existing ones.</dd>
  *
  *   <dt><b>Liskov Substitution Principle (LSP)</b></dt>
  *   <dd>Any implementation of these interfaces can be substituted without
  *       breaking the compiler.</dd>
  *
  *   <dt><b>Interface Segregation Principle (ISP)</b></dt>
  *   <dd>Clients can depend on specific configuration interfaces rather than
  *       a monolithic configuration class.</dd>
  *
  *   <dt><b>Dependency Inversion Principle (DIP)</b></dt>
  *   <dd>High-level modules depend on these abstractions, not concrete
  *       implementations like InternalOptions.</dd>
  * </dl>
  *
  * <h3>Usage Patterns</h3>
  *
  * <h4>1. Reducing Coupling</h4>
  * <pre>{@code
  * // BEFORE: Tightly coupled to InternalOptions
  * public class Optimizer {
  *     private final InternalOptions options;
  *     public boolean shouldOptimize() {
  *         return options.isOptimizing();
  *     }
  * }
  *
  * // AFTER: Depends only on required configuration
  * public class Optimizer {
  *     private final OptimizationConfiguration config;
  *     public Optimizer(OptimizationConfiguration config) {
  *         this.config = config;
  *     }
  *     public boolean shouldOptimize() {
  *         return config.isTreeShakingEnabled();
  *     }
  * }
  * }</pre>
  *
  * <h4>2. Improving Testability</h4>
  * <pre>{@code
  * // Easy to create test doubles
  * OptimizationConfiguration testConfig = new OptimizationConfiguration() {
  *     @Override public boolean isTreeShakingEnabled() { return true; }
  *     // ... other methods with defaults
  * };
  * Optimizer optimizer = new Optimizer(testConfig);
  * }</pre>
  *
  * <h3>Migration Strategy</h3>
  *
  * <ol>
  *   <li><b>Phase 1</b>: InternalOptions implements CompilerConfiguration</li>
  *   <li><b>Phase 2</b>: New code uses sub-interfaces instead of InternalOptions</li>
  *   <li><b>Phase 3</b>: Existing code gradually migrates to interfaces</li>
  *   <li><b>Phase 4</b>: InternalOptions becomes a thin facade or is removed</li>
  * </ol>
  *
  * @see CompilerConfiguration
  * @see CompilationConfiguration
  * @see OptimizationConfiguration
  * @see DesugaringConfiguration
  * @see ThreadingConfiguration
  * @see ApiLevelConfiguration
  * @see ConsumerConfiguration
  */
 package com.android.tools.r8.config;

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 Do you want to create package-info.java?
 ❯ 1. Yes
   2. Yes, allow all edits during this session (shift+tab)
   3. No
